title: Consultation on Proposed Changes to the Medical Devices Directorate’s Draft Guidance Document - List of Recognized Standards for Medical Devices - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation on proposed changes to the Medical Devices Directorate’s Draft Guidance Document - List of Recognized Standards for Medical Devices - Closed Consultation

## Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from January 15, 2021 to March 16, 2021 See the " What we heard " report for summaries of the discussions that took place.
The goal of the consultation was to solicit feedback from stakeholders in regards to an update to the List of Recognized Standards for Medical Devices.

## Who was the focus of this consultation
- Interested public parties
- Healthcare professionals
- Medical device manufacturers

## Goals of the consultation
The consultation aimed to notify stakeholders of the proposed changes to the List of Recognized Standards for Medical Devices and solicit feedback to ensure that stakeholders had no objections with the proposed modifications.

## Key questions for discussion
Ideas and inputs were sought regarding:
- The removal of 3 standards
- The addition of 14 new standards; and
- The replacement of previous editions with 29 new editions of currently recognized standards
The input that was gathered through this process will be used to update MDD's List of Recognized Standards for Medical Devices.
There were editorial changes suggested, which will be adopted as part of the final version of the List of Recognized Standards. Additionally, new standards and new versions of standards were proposed. The proposals have been documented such that they can be considered for future revisions of the List of Recognize Standards.
Medical Devices Directorate Health Canada 11 Holland Ave, Tower A Address locator: 3005B Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9
Fax: 613-957-9969 Email: standards.committee@canada.ca
